overview: I converted my Feature Spec Generator CLI into a Streamlit web app, deployed it to Streamlit Cloud, wired MS Teams webhook notifications, and rolled it out to my PM team — all in 5 days. By day 5, I had 12 completed specs and a backlog of user feedback.

keyPoints.title: App went live with public URL in under 10 minutes
Shipped v1 single-agent, not v4 multi-agent — intentionally
Teams webhook took 10 minutes, answered 'Is anyone using this?'
12 specs generated on day-1 rollout with PM team
Streamlit session state and rerun are the core framework primitives
